description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical body, slightly bulging at the center and tapering towards the ends. The exterior is constructed from vertical wooden staves, tightly bound by three dark metal hoops—one near the top, one at the bottom, and one around the middle. The wood grain is visible, giving the surface a natural, slightly rough texture, and the metal bands show a matte, slightly weathered finish. The barrel is open at the top, revealing the interior, which is also made of wood and appears hollow. The asset includes three barrels: one upright and two lying on their sides, all sharing the same construction and materials. There are no visible handles, lids, or markings, and the barrels are of a size suitable for storage or decorative use in urban environments.
description: A set of wooden barrels with dark metal hoops, open at the top and featuring a natural wood grain texture. The barrels are sturdy, hollow, and unmarked, ideal for storage or urban decor.
description_view_0: The upright barrel is shown from above with a clear view of the open top and interior, while a second barrel lies horizontally in front.
description_view_1: The upright barrel is flanked by two horizontal barrels, showing the rounded sides and the open ends of the barrels.
description_view_2: The upright barrel is accompanied by a single horizontal barrel, highlighting the curvature and the metal hoops.
description_view_3: The upright barrel is centered with two horizontal barrels on either side, displaying the full cylindrical shape and open ends.
